addAccount.description: Add an account before balances, usage, and automation can be summarized.
addAccount.title: No accounts yet

addProfile.description: Add API credentials so tools and export flows can reuse them.
addProfile.title: No API profiles yet

disabled.description: Auto check-in is turned off. Turn it back on when you want the extension to claim check-in rewards for you.

notRun.description: No check-in has run yet. After account detection is enabled, the next schedule will handle it, or you can open auto check-in to run it manually.

autoCheckin.disabled: Turn on auto check-in when you want rewards claimed automatically. Future schedules and results will appear here.

managedSiteModelSync.disabled: Turn on model sync when you want managed-site models refreshed automatically. Sync interval and scope will appear here.

siteAnnouncements.disabled: Turn on announcement polling when you want site updates surfaced here. Recent checks and announcement counts will appear here.

webdavAutoSync.disabled: Configure WebDAV auto sync when you want cross-device backups. Sync strategy and scope will appear here.

accountFoundation.description: Accounts, balances, and health state that other features depend on.
accountFoundation.label: Account foundation

state.disabled: Account status cannot be read yet. Check that the account setup is complete.
state.needs_setup: Add at least one account so the overview can summarize balances, usage, and automation status for you.
state.not_applicable: You can continue without adding an account in this environment.

automation.description: Whether auto check-in and announcement polling are ready to run.
automation.label: Automation

state.disabled: No tasks will run automatically for now. Turn on check-in or announcement polling when you need them.
state.needs_setup: Automation still needs an eligible account or detection setup before it can run.
state.not_applicable: There are no automation tasks available in this environment yet.

backupSync.description: Local data backup and cross-device sync configuration.
backupSync.label: Backup sync

state.disabled: Your data stays on this device. Turn on WebDAV sync when you want a cross-device backup.
state.needs_setup: Connect WebDAV first so local data can be backed up remotely.
state.not_applicable: Backup sync is not available in this environment yet.

credentialAssets.description: API profiles and account keys prepared for use.
credentialAssets.label: Credential assets

state.disabled: There are no reusable credentials yet. Check account or API profile setup.
state.needs_setup: Add API profiles so tools and export flows can reuse them directly.
state.not_applicable: This environment does not need separate API profiles.

dataHistory.description: Whether usage and balance history have data to inspect.
dataHistory.label: Data history

state.disabled: History is not being saved yet. Turn it on to keep future usage and balance changes.
state.needs_setup: History is enabled, but it still needs an account or first data point. This section will update after data appears.
state.not_applicable: There is no data history to view in this environment yet.

managedSite.description: Managed-site channel administration and model sync capabilities.
managedSite.label: Managed site

state.disabled: No managed site is connected yet. Connect one when you need channel or model management.
state.needs_setup: Connect a managed site first, then you can manage channels or sync models here.
state.not_applicable: This site type does not support managed-site administration yet.

description: Review the current state of accounts, keys, usage, and automated tasks.

states.allClear: There is nothing that needs attention right now.
states.loadedWithError: Some information failed to load. Showing available data.

title: Overview

empty.description: After you send a request or sync usage history, this card will summarize today's requests, tokens, cost, and the latest 7-day trend.
empty.title: No usage recorded yet

usage.todayShare: Today's share of the latest 7 days
